name: Pancakes

instructions: Mix ingredients. Cook on a hot pan until golden.

name: Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Whisk eggs and cook in butter.

name: French Toast
instructions: Dip bread in mixture and fry.

name: Omelette
instructions: Cook eggs and fold with cheese.

name: Chicken Salad

instructions: Cook chicken and toss with vegetables.

name: Beef Burger
ingredients: Ground Beef:200:g, Burger Bun:2:whole, Cheese:40:g, Lettuce:30:g

instructions: Cook pasta and prepare meat sauce.

name: Chicken Alfredo
instructions: Cook pasta and combine with sauce.

name: Chicken Curry
ingredients: Chicken Breast:300:g, Curry Powder:20:g, Coconut Milk:250:ml

name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Mash avocado and spread on toast.
